0.description: Canonical Drafts server. Reference implementation maintained by Drafts.

tier_meaning.server: Server-level access. Root credential for one Drafts server.
tier_meaning.project: Project-level access. Owner of one project.
tier_meaning.agent: Agent-level access. Contributor with isolated branch.

token_format.server_number: Integer. 0 is the canonical server at beta.labs.vc. Others registered via PR.
token_format.secret: Lowercase hex. 64 chars for server tier, 48 chars for project/agent tiers.

claim_a_number: Open a pull request against https://github.com/g0rd33v/labs-drafts adding your server to this registry. One number per operational Drafts instance.
